class OrderService:
    def __init__(self):
        self.db = DatabaseConnection()
        self.cache = RedisCache()
        self.logger = Logger("orders")
        self.email_client = EmailClient()
        self.metrics = MetricsCollector()
        self.validator = OrderValidator()
        self.pricing_engine = PricingEngine()

    def create_order(self, order_data: dict) -> dict:
        self.validator.validate(order_data)
        return {"id": "order-123", "status": "created"}


class ReportGenerator:
    def __init__(self, config: dict):
        self.db = DatabaseConnection(config["db_url"])
        self.s3 = S3Client(config["bucket"])
        self.pdf_engine = PdfEngine()
        self.template_loader = TemplateLoader()
        self.cache = CacheLayer()
        self.notifier = SlackNotifier(config["webhook"])

    def generate(self, report_type: str) -> bytes:
        template = self.template_loader.load(report_type)
        return self.pdf_engine.render(template)
